demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I feel completely wired but exhausted, and my whole body aches from being constantly on guard. I haven't slept properly in two days and I can't switch off.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The aching and the racing, keyed-up feeling have got a lot worse over the last two days and I've had basically no sleep, so I wanted someone to check me over tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: Building over about three weeks and much worse in the last 48 hours.
symptom_narrative.duration: Roughly three weeks of feeling increasingly on edge; the severe aching and the sleeplessness are the last two days.
symptom_narrative.character: My muscles feel rock hard and sore, especially across my shoulders, neck and back. I feel wired and keyed up, my heart feels like it's going fast, and I can't relax or sleep at all.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: It's the worst it's been — I feel like I'm going to run out of steam completely.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Mostly my shoulders, neck and upper back, but honestly my whole body aches.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: It's there most of the time now and gets worse in the evenings when I lie down and start going over things in my head.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Not much. I've tried the odd ibuprofen but it barely touches it.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Being around people who talk down to me or don't make room for me, and lying awake at night replaying those conversations.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Feeling angry and worn out, no motivation, and I've been avoiding going out because it takes so much out of me.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt stressed and tense before but never this physically wrecked or this sleepless.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still look after myself at home, but I'm too exhausted and drained to get out into the community.

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: ibuprofen (over the counter, now and then)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I keep running into people who are condescending or who talk down to me and don't make accommodations, and I feel like I'm constantly having to stand up for myself. It's been wearing me down and I've started pulling back from situations where I know I'll be treated that way.
